symptoms: Terminal input jitters or flickers while typing in Ink CLI tools like Claude Code or Gemini
Terminal viewport drifts or jumps during streaming output from AI models
Terminal appears blank or shows stale/corrupted content after switching to another view and back
Opening 16+ terminal tabs causes WebGL context crash or blank terminal screen
SIGWINCH signal flood from redundant resizes causes Ink TUI to continuously redraw unnecessarily
Session ID in InfoPanel flickers between two different values every 1-2 seconds
Timeline constantly reloads and entry points jump around without user interaction
Conversation history unexpectedly truncates or switches to a different branch during viewing
Interface becomes jerky and unresponsive after selecting Clear Context in Plan Mode
Electron window doesn't appear on macOS until Dock icon is clicked, despite dev server starting and icon showing in Dock
Double-click on title bar empty area triggers native window zoom dialog instead of JavaScript double-click handler
Click or mousedown events on title bar buttons and tabs do not fire despite event listeners being attached
Build fails with 'Transform failed: Unexpected character $' error when main.js uses template literals with shell variables like $PWD
Gemini CLI doesn't show ready-to-input signal or cursor visibility change; pasted commands execute as text instead of running
Drag-and-drop visual indicators cause visible Layout Shift and flexbox reflow when dragging items over drop zones
Large console logs are truncated or bloated when copying to clipboard; context window wasted on metadata and formatting
Session export includes fork marker after every user message instead of at true branch point
Exported Markdown contains huge code dumps and tool results, overflowing context window
Rewind prompt includes AI opinions or future plans instead of pure technical facts
Copying range from Gemini session returns empty text or wrong UUID range
Update Docs fails when current tab is Gemini instead of Claude
Forest tree visualization shows wrong session boundaries or misses plan mode transitions
Exported file ends at compact_boundary instead of continuing to actual fork point
Rewind menu cursor overshoots and selects wrong history entry despite text matching visually
Navigation to target message in Rewind menu fails silently when target is outside visible scroll area
Session unexpectedly rolls back to beginning instead of reaching target recovery point after Rewind selection
Duplicate messages in history cause navigation to stop at wrong position or skip intended message
Rewind menu closes without selecting intended message after multiple UP arrow presses with no error
Prompt shows raw ANSI escape codes like `38;2;153;153;153m` as visible text instead of being interpreted as color commands
Colored prompt text renders with default colors instead of intended styling, showing visual artifacts randomly
Terminal color corruption happens intermittently (1-5% of cases), especially under high system load or heavy PTY buffer usage
Escape sequences break mid-sequence when large amounts of terminal output are generated quickly and get rendered as literal text
After Electron restart, Gemini cannot locate existing Claude sub-agent or finds it in error state instead of resuming with context
Claude process crashes mid-task, but continue_claude should auto-respawn PTY and resume transparently without manual intervention
Gemini needs to read Claude's previous work output without creating new delegation; requires stateless history lookup by task ID
Claude response must inject into Gemini stream with proper footer metadata (Tab name, Model, Context percentage)
App closes with pending Claude responses in queue, but responses vanish on restart instead of auto-restoring from persistence
Sub-agent tab was closed, but Gemini still sees it in list_sub_agents with IDLE status and tries to write to non-existent PTY
Sub-agent timeout behavior unclear: 30-minute limit reset logic, persistence across restarts, interaction with PTY respawn
